sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39119" key="e)pide/droma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιδέδρομα</orth>, poet. <tns opt="n" TEIform="tns">pf.</tns> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0062.tlg040:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope> </bibl> of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπιτρέχω</foreign>.</entryFree>
